info.name: C2C Exchange API Tests
info.description: Postman collection for NestJS C2C Exchange API. Recommended run order: 00 setup, 01 THB fiat purchase, 02 USD fiat purchase, 03 internal transfer, 04 external withdrawal, then 07 register/KYC and negative folders as needed. External withdrawal uses configured networks and support/admin completion. Use seeded local demo data: npm run seed. Stateful flow requests mutate balances/statuses; reset and seed DB before a clean full rerun. There is no on-platform fiat wallet in the current API; fiat checks assert trade fiatAmount and fiatPayments proof state. Demo password for seeded users: password123.

item.name: 00 Setup - Sessions and Reference
Auth Sessions
item.description: Run these first. Tokens are stored in collection variables.

exec: pm.test('USDT supports TRX/ETH/BSC', function () { const networks = pm.response.json().map(function (item) { return item.network; }); pm.expect(networks).to.include('TRX'); pm.expect(networks).to.include('ETH'); pm.expect(networks).to.include('BSC'); });

item.description: Login and read-only reference calls needed before the business flows.

item.name: 01 Flow - Buy BTC With THB From Another User

exec: pm.test('wallet includes BTC', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'BTC'; })).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('wallet includes XRP', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'XRP'; })).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('wallet includes BTC', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'BTC'; })).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('ads are SELL', function () { ads.forEach(function (ad) { pm.expect(ad.side).to.eql('SELL'); }); });
pm.test('ads use BTC', function () { ads.forEach(function (ad) { pm.expect(ad.asset.symbol).to.eql('BTC'); }); });

item.name: 04 Buyer Opens BTC/THB Trade From Seller SELL Ad

exec: pm.test('trade fiat currency is THB', function () { pm.expect(json.ad.fiatCurrency.code).to.eql('THB'); });
pm.test('no fiat payment proof before buyer pays THB', function () { pm.expect(json.fiatPayments || []).to.have.length(0); });

pm.test('THB payment is submitted for the trade fiat amount', function () { const payment = thbPaidTrade.fiatPayments[0]; pm.expect(payment.status).to.eql('SUBMITTED'); pm.expect(Number(payment.amount)).to.eql(Number(thbPaidTrade.fiatAmount)); pm.expect(payment.paymentMethod.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('sellerThbPaymentMethodId')); });
pm.test('THB payment accepted after BTC release', function () { pm.expect(thbReleasedTrade.fiatPayments).to.have.length(1); pm.expect(thbReleasedTrade.fiatPayments[0].status).to.eql('ACCEPTED'); });
pm.test('wallet includes BTC', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'BTC'; })).to.eql(true); });

item.description: Buyer pays THB off-platform, then seller releases BTC escrow inside the system.

item.name: 02 Flow - Buy ETH With USD From Another User

exec: pm.test('wallet includes ETH', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'ETH'; })).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('wallet includes ETH', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'ETH'; })).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('ads are BUY', function () { ads.forEach(function (ad) { pm.expect(ad.side).to.eql('BUY'); }); });
pm.test('ads use ETH', function () { ads.forEach(function (ad) { pm.expect(ad.asset.symbol).to.eql('ETH'); }); });

item.name: 04 Seller Accepts Buyer BUY ETH/USD Ad

exec: pm.test('trade fiat currency is USD', function () { pm.expect(json.ad.fiatCurrency.code).to.eql('USD'); });
pm.test('no fiat payment proof before buyer pays USD', function () { pm.expect(json.fiatPayments || []).to.have.length(0); });

pm.test('USD payment is submitted for the trade fiat amount', function () { const payment = usdPaidTrade.fiatPayments[0]; pm.expect(payment.status).to.eql('SUBMITTED'); pm.expect(Number(payment.amount)).to.eql(Number(usdPaidTrade.fiatAmount)); pm.expect(payment.paymentMethod.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('sellerUsdPaymentMethodId')); });
pm.test('USD payment accepted after ETH release', function () { pm.expect(usdReleasedTrade.fiatPayments).to.have.length(1); pm.expect(usdReleasedTrade.fiatPayments[0].status).to.eql('ACCEPTED'); });
pm.test('wallet includes ETH', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'ETH'; })).to.eql(true); });

item.description: Buyer wants to buy ETH with USD via a BUY ad; seller accepts, buyer submits USD payment proof, seller releases ETH.

item.name: 03 Flow - Internal Crypto Transfer
01 Buyer Wallet Before Internal XRP Transfer

exec: pm.test('wallet includes XRP', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'XRP'; })).to.eql(true); });

item.name: 02 Buyer Sends XRP To Seller Internally

exec: pm.test('wallet includes XRP', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'XRP'; })).to.eql(true); });

item.description: Move crypto between platform users without leaving the exchange.

item.name: 04 Flow - External Crypto Withdrawal

exec: pm.test('wallet includes ETH', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'ETH'; })).to.eql(true); });

item.name: 02 Seller Creates Pending ETH External Withdrawal

exec: pm.test('configured ETH fee is applied', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().networkFee).to.eql('0.002'); });
pm.test('wallet includes ETH', function () { const rows = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(rows.some(function (row) { return row.asset && row.asset.symbol === 'ETH'; })).to.eql(true); });

item.description: Withdraw crypto from a platform wallet to an external address.

item.name: 05 Feature - P2P Ad Management
item.description: Create and cancel ads outside the main fiat purchase flows.

item.name: 07 Flow - Register and KYC

exec: pm.test('new user starts pending KYC', function () { pm.expect(json.user.kycStatus).to.eql('PENDING'); });

item.name: 02 Support Cannot Verify Pending KYC Trader

exec: pm.test('registered user has trader role', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().roles.map(function (role) { return role.code; })).to.include('trader'); });

item.description: Register a new trader, confirm KYC starts as PENDING, verify that support cannot approve it, then let admin verify KYC. Logout remains optional and should run last.
